meta.title: Inside the Architecture of the Universal Exchange

transcript: Good afternoon. To be honest, I'm always happy to come to Solana Breakpoint and seeing you all. But my favorite thing about coming to UAE is the Medjool dates. I always bring boxes of these dates when I go back to Hong Kong because you can't buy it at home. And how many of you are launching a token on Solana? Can I have a show of hands? Building a project on Solana? And your token, when it's launched on Solana, it's pretty much most likely traded on DEX. And that's the kind of experience my dates feel. What I mean by that is, most of the DEX don't have as much volume or liquidity as a CEX. Just like I can't buy these specific regional dates in all the international supermarket. But with our launch of UEX, this will not be the case anymore. So, UEX gives you this kind of experience where all the on-chain data that was only available on the so-called regional supermarket, aka DEX, now can be available on CEX. So with our UEX model, whatever you launch on Solana is automatically tradable on Bitget centralized exchange. So getting on CEX means you don't need to, you know, just go through the tedious CEX listing process because again, when our user put in your contract address, they can trade your token on the on-chain part of a CEX, centralized exchange. Previously people just thought DEX, CEX, they are two worlds. But in our opinion, we don't agree. We think the integration of UEX, DEX, and TradFi, which is RWA, is going to be the future. For example, today on Bitget you can buy tokenized ETFs, tokenized US stocks, tokenized commodity, and even forex. Together with, of course, your favorite Bitcoin, Solana, as well as some other altcoins. But again, all those Solana tokens can be traded, tradable on Bitget. And we think the UEX experience is going to give our industry more liquidity as well as, just similar back to my date metaphor, it's going to be available in every single supermarket in the world. Another problem we're trying to solve here is, how many of you have looked at your portfolio this morning? I suppose in terms of your portfolio, you probably opened a centralized exchange app such as Binance, Coinbase, Bitget, or decentralized wallet such as MetaMask, such as Phantom, as well as your US stocks account, eToro, Robinhood. Again, you can do them all on Bitget. And not just those token coverage, we also provide AI solution. I had a conversation with ChatGPT about a year ago. I asked it to recommend me top 10 tokens to hold in my portfolio. And I specified low risk. However, ChatGPT gave me Luna. So that's the kind of problem that non-crypto specific AI product may have. That's why we developed our own AI that is called GetAgent. Let me just quickly run through this 30 seconds video to tell you how trading on Bitget feels today. So you put in your CA and this is the GetAgent part. You can ask it, you know, what's your thought on adding Solana to my portfolio? And it gives you a thorough analysis on Solana based on your portfolio. So our future in terms of the crypto, what we think, of course RWA is growing. And as you can see from here, the whole RWA market has been booming from January 2023. That's one year before ETF went approval. And now Wall Street is taking a lot of stakes on the crypto industry. And what that means for Solana is that it is the core execution layer inside the concept of UEX. So I want you all to try our UEX product after today. Thank you so much.

enrichment.generated_query: UEX Bitget Solana Breakpoint 2025 announcement blog technical documentation

tags.impact_reason: Bitget launched UEX to enable direct trading of any on-chain Solana token via their centralized interface without traditional listing processes, bridging CEX and DEX liquidity.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic floodgate as the Semantic Anchor, directly referencing the headline's 'Opens 100M User Floodgates'. This powerful, architectural metaphor visually represents the UEX protocol as a piece of core infrastructure that is unleashing a massive, previously contained flow of assets (DEX tokens) into a larger ecosystem (CEX liquidity). For the integrated text, I chose '100M' to quantify the scale of the user base being granted access. Placing it as a holographic readout on the gate itself makes it a diegetic part of the technological marvel, reinforcing the high-tech, high-impact nature of the story.
visual_idea.description: A colossal, brutalist-style concrete floodgate is opening, unleashing a torrent of liquid, glowing data streams in Solana's purple and green. The sheer volume of the data-flow creates an overwhelming sense of power. On the monolithic wall of the gate, a stark, white holographic display projects the number '100M', its light shimmering on the wet concrete texture. The background is a vast, dark, cavernous space, implying the immense depth of the centralized exchange's liquidity pool now being accessed.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A colossal, brutalist-style concrete floodgate is opening, unleashing a torrent of liquid, glowing data streams in Solana's vibrant purple and electric green. The sheer, overwhelming volume of the data-flow emanates an immense sense of power, illuminated by dramatic volumetric lighting. On the monolithic, rough-textured wet concrete wall of the gate, a stark, white holographic display projects the number '100M', its ethereal light shimmering intensely on the textured, damp surface. The background recedes into a vast, dark, cavernous space, implying the immense depth of the centralized exchange's liquidity pool now being accessed, with high-contrast chiaroscuro emphasizing the monumental scale and dark atmosphere. Composition is vertical (3:4 aspect ratio), captured from an extreme low-angle with an ultra-wide-angle lens, emphasizing the towering height of the floodgate and the epic scale of the data conduit, with significant negative space above the structure to enhance its monumental presence. The liquid data streams are highlighted with crisp rim lighting. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, cinematic, photorealistic.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic floodgate as the Semantic Anchor, directly referencing the headline's 'Opens 100M User Floodgates'. This powerful, architectural metaphor visually represents the UEX protocol as a piece of core infrastructure that is unleashing a massive, previously contained flow of assets (DEX tokens) into a larger ecosystem (CEX liquidity). For the integrated text, I chose '100M' to quantify the scale of the user base being granted access. Placing it as a holographic readout on the gate itself makes it a diegetic part of the technological marvel, reinforcing the high-tech, high-impact nature of the story.
visual_idea.description: An extreme close-up on the colossal hinge mechanism of the floodgate. We see the immense strain on the weathered, dark metal as the gate moves. A blindingly bright river of purple and green light particles, representing the torrent of Solana assets, rushes past the edge of the frame, creating intense motion blur and a powerful sense of unstoppable flow. The focus is on the textures of industrial metal meeting ethereal energy.

final_prompt.prompt_text: An extreme close-up on the colossal hinge mechanism of the floodgate. The composition is a tight macro frame, centrally focused and symmetrical, completely filled with the intricate textures of the subject. The weathered, dark industrial metal of the hinge is under immense strain as the gate moves, its surface etched with deep imperfections and signs of powerful mechanical stress. Rust and grime cling to its brutalist, geometric forms, emphasizing its raw, unyielding nature. Adjacent to the hinge, a blindingly bright, iridescent river of purple and green light particles, representing the torrent of Solana assets, rushes past the edge of the frame. This liquid data stream is alive with ethereal energy, depicted with intense motion blur and volumetric lighting, creating a powerful sense of unstoppable, glowing flow. Strong god rays pierce through the atmospheric haze, highlighting the contrast between the rough, dark metal and the luminous, flowing energy. The focus is exclusively on the hyper-detailed textures where the stark industrial metal meets the vibrant, ethereal energy, showcasing intricate surface details and light reflections. 1:1 aspect ratio, 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, cinematic volumetric lighting, extreme texture detail.

editorial.headline: Bitget Opens 100M User Floodgates to Solana Developers via 'No-Listing' UEX Protocol
editorial.standfirst: In a radical shift for exchange market structure, Bitget's new Universal Exchange (UEX) model allows instantaneous trading of any Solana asset without traditional vetting, effectively merging DEX accessibility with CEX liquidity.
key_takeaways: Instant Liquidity: Solana developers can now bypass traditional CEX listing queues; users trade any token simply by inputting its contract address.
Massive Scale: The integration immediately exposes on-chain Solana assets to Bitget's 100 million registered users.
AI Execution: The new 'GetAgent' tool offers crypto-native portfolio analysis and execution, solving the hallucination issues plaguing generic LLMs.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
The historical friction between decentralized innovation and centralized distribution effectively evaporated this afternoon in Abu Dhabi. Speaking at **Solana Breakpoint 2025**, **Bitget** CEO **Gracy Chen** unveiled the **Universal Exchange (UEX)**, a hybrid architecture that fundamentally alters the go-to-market strategy for Solana projects. By allowing users to trade any on-chain asset simply by pasting a contract address (CA), Bitget has removed the industry's most significant bottleneck: the centralized listing process. For institutional investors and VCs, the implication is immediate—portfolio companies building on Solana now have day-one access to a retail base of over 100 million users, bypassing the months-long liquidity purgatory typically associated with CEX listings.

This architecture positions Solana as the "core execution layer" of the UEX model, bridging the gap between "regional" on-chain liquidity and the "international supermarket" of global centralized exchanges. Chen’s metaphor of Medjool dates—accessible locally but hard to find globally—aptly describes the current plight of DEX-native tokens. By wrapping on-chain execution in a CEX interface, Bitget is not just aggregating liquidity; they are institutionalizing the long-tail of crypto assets. This effectively creates a permissionless listing environment within a permissioned, KYC-compliant platform, a holy grail for regulatory-compliant liquidity expansion.

Beyond raw access, the UEX platform integrates a burgeoning Real-World Asset (RWA) engine. Users can now cross-margin tokenized US equities, commodities, and forex against their crypto holdings in a single unified account. This convergence is powered by **GetAgent**, a proprietary AI execution tool designed to mitigate the risks of generic Large Language Models (LLMs). Unlike generalist AIs that might hallucinate defunct tokens (like Luna) as low-risk investments, GetAgent is trained specifically on live on-chain data and portfolio context, offering institutional-grade analysis and execution. For the Solana ecosystem, this signals a maturity phase where infrastructure is no longer about just speed, but about seamless, intelligent integration into the broader global financial fabric.
